MaxLineLength:AddEditBalanceDialog.kt$onConfirm(Balance(id = initial?.id ?: 0, name = name.trim(), reliability = reliability, amount = amount))
MaxLineLength:HelpScreen.kt$"Tap an amount to quick-edit it. Tap item name to edit or delete. Sort by a-z, avg, or last; tap again to reverse."
MaxLineLength:ItemCard.kt$modifier = modifier.fillMaxWidth().then(if (onClick != null) Modifier.clickable(onClick = onClick) else Modifier)
MaxLineLength:WelcomeScreen.kt$description = "Enter monthly expenses and income with three estimates: best case, last month actual, and worst case."
MaxLineLength:WelcomeScreen.kt$description = "See how long your money lasts across six scenarios combining asset reliability with budget estimates."
ReturnCount:LifetimeScreen.kt$private fun computeBarSegments( rows: List<LifetimeRow>, highIdx: Int, medIdx: Int, lowIdx: Int, ): BarSegments
